'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 4''' is the fourth issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in summer [[1995]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 4, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with a ''[[1995 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 3]]'' promotional trading card, a Topps Finest chromium [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]] trading card, and a Jumbo "Quad" card featuring the cover art from the first four issues of ''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine''. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[The Hard, Cold Facts About Hoth]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*''[[Use the Force]]'': Trivia Strikes Back Contest: An All-[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Empire'']] Brainteaser
